title: Chinna Chinna Roja Poove Lyrics Poovizhi Vasalile Song Lyrics
stanzas:
Chinna Chinna Roja Poove
chella kannae nee yaaru
thappi vandha sirppi muthae
unna peththa thaai yaaru

sollikolla vaayumillai
allikolla thaayum illai
yaeno sodhanai
ila nenjinil vedhanai.

Chinna Chinna Roja Poove
chella kannae nee yaaru

chinna pinju nenjukullae
enna enna aasai undo
ullam thannai moodi vaiththa
dheivam vandhal sollum ingae

oorum illai perum illai
unmai solla yaarum illai
neeyum ini naanum
oru jeevan thaanadaa

solai kili polae
en tholil aadadaa
idhu pesaa oviyam
idhil sogam aayiram.

Chinna Chinna Roja Poove
chella kannae nee yaaru
thappi vandha sirppi muthae
unna peththa thaai yaaru

kannil unnai kaanum podhu
ennam engo poguthaiyaa
ennai pona pillai
ingae undhan kolam kondu
vandhadhendru ennugindren
vazhthu solli paaduginren

gangai nee endraal
karai ingu naanadaa
vaanam naan endraal
vidi velli neeyadaa

Chinna Chinna Roja Poove
chella kannae nee yaaru
thappi vandha sirppi muthae
unna peththa thaai yaaru

sollikolla vaayumillai
allikolla thaayum illai
yaeno sodhanai
ila nenjinil vedhanai.

enrichedMetadata.faq:
Frequently Asked Questions

What is the meaning of the song?

The song expresses deep romantic feelings and longing, beautifully capturing the essence of love.

What is the plot context of the song in the movie?

In Poovizhi Vasalile, the song reflects the protagonist's emotions and romantic aspirations.

Who is the singer of this song?

The song is sung by the legendary K.J. Yesudhas.

Who composed the music for this song?

The music for this song was composed by the renowned Ilaiyaraaja.

When was this song released?

This song was released on January 14, 1987.
enrichedMetadata.summary: In Chinna Chinna Roja Poove, the protagonist expresses his heartfelt emotions and desires through a beautiful melody. The song captures the essence of romance, evoking feelings of nostalgia and longing. Set against the backdrop of Poovizhi Vasalile, it enhances the emotional depth of the narrative. The soothing composition by Ilaiyaraaja and the soulful rendition by K.J. Yesudhas make this song a cherished classic in Tamil cinema.
enrichedMetadata.high_ctr_intro: Chinna Chinna Roja Poove from Poovizhi Vasalile is a timeless melody that captures the essence of romance and nostalgia. With the enchanting voice of K.J. Yesudhas and the masterful composition by Ilaiyaraaja, this song takes listeners on a heartfelt journey. Experience the magic of this classic that continues to resonate with audiences even today.
stanzaMeanings: Little little rose flower, dear one, who are you? Who is the mother who gave birth to this beautiful statue?
There is no one to speak, there is no one to tell, why is there no test? There is only pain in the heart.
Little little rose flower, dear one, who are you?
In this little heart, what desires do I have? If the God who closed my heart comes, will He tell me?
There is no place, no one to tell the truth. You and I are just one life.
Like a parrot in the garden, my work is to dance. This is a painting, and in it, there is a thousand sorrows.
Little little rose flower, dear one, who are you? Who is the mother who gave birth to this beautiful statue?
When I see you in my eyes, where does my mind go? If I am a child who has gone away, I am here, and I sing praises of your beauty.
If you are the river, then I am the shore. If I am the sky, then you are the shining moon.
In my life, peace is your presence.
Little little rose flower, dear one, who are you? Who is the mother who gave birth to this beautiful statue?
There is no one to speak, there is no one to tell, why is there no test? There is only pain in the heart.
